creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Please resubmit a new shar, 

|XSHA256 (rubygem/ruby-fighter-0.0.0.gem) = 00f6dd829a6cb831dec00d03f6b38afbe2ea59422dc6b985e7145159bb8c38fc
|XSIZE (rubygem/ruby-fighter-0.0.0.gem) = 500736
|4398ba667e935bb5a0f333585b7fb203
|echo c - rubygem-ruby-fighter/files
|mkdir -p rubygem-ruby-fighter/files > /dev/null 2>&1
|echo x - rubygem-ruby-fighter/files/patch-bin_ruby-fighter
|sed 's/^X//' >rubygem-ruby-fighter/files/patch-bin_ruby-fighter << 'f00eea3163bd8dc5ffdce6666de93b02'
|X--- bin/ruby-fighter.orig	2015-06-17 22:44:03 UTC
|X+++ bin/ruby-fighter
--------------------------
File to patch:

Also please add LICENCES and LICENENS file, and run portlint -AC.

Thanks in advance.
